sglang.title: Optimize MLA/GQA/MQA Triton decoding
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Optimize memory access for MLA/GQA/MQA decoding.
Modification
One block handle BLOCK_H q heads with shared k/v head. Inspired by InternLM/lmdeploy#1649.

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove Gemma RoPE
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR removes GemmaRotaryEmbedding because it is actually the same as the normal RotaryEmbedding.
This is because
torch.arange(0, self.rotary_dim, 2, dtype=torch.float)
is equal to
torch.arange(0, self.rotary_dim, 2, dtype=torch.int64).float()
as rotary_dim is less than or equal to head_size (i.e.

vllm.title: [MISC] Add prefix cache hit rate to metrics
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds prefix cache hit rate to log metrics. The metrics will be logged only when the prefix cache is enabled. Here is an example:
[INFO 08-16 11:53:40 metrics.py:418] Avg prompt throughput: 2876.7 tokens/s, Avg generation throughput: 384.8 tokens/s, Running: 91 reqs, Swapped: 0 reqs, Pending:

vllm.title: [core] Multi Step Scheduling
vllm.author: SolitaryThinker
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds initial multi step scheduling support to vLLM.
RFC: #6854
Current Status:
8/16: Initial support for chunked prefill thanks to @varun-sundar-rabindranath
8/14: Ready for another round of reviews! please review #7452
8/8: multi-node working
8/6: PP+TP working; PP+ray fixed; a few single GPU perf

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Don't disable existing loggers
vllm.author: a-ys
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
One-liner that stops existing loggers from being disabled. By default, logging.dictConfig disables existing named loggers.
This bug only occurs when Ray is not installed (e.g. for AWS Neuron). This is because Ray adds this field to their logging configuration here.
FIX #5803
Code Example
import logg

vllm.title: [Bugfix] use StoreBoolean instead of type=bool for --disable-logprobs-during-spec-decoding
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The --disable-logprobs-during-spec-decoding flag defaults to True and cannot be set to false by setting --disable-logprobs-during-spec-decoding=false. The problem is using type=bool as the type for the arg value. From the argparse documentation

The bool() function is not recommended as a type conve

vllm.title: [Bugfix] support `tie_word_embeddings` for all models
vllm.author: zijian-hu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR addresses #5621
It unifies the support for tie_word_embeddings across all models. For models that do not support this feature, a clear error message will be displayed when tie_word_embeddings is enabled. The modifications are designed such that only minimal changes are made to the original c

vllm.title: [CI] Organizing performance benchmark files
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reorganizing performance benchmark files.

All documentations should be in .buildkite/nightly-benchmarks
All buildkite workflow yaml files should be in .buildkite/nightly-benchmarks
All scripts should be in .buildkite/nightly-benchmarks/scripts

#7412 will also fix nightly benchmark scripts and file
